prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock C30LE 3.0L twin-turbocharged inline-6 with a fully built version featuring forged internals (JE 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft) to handle 1.5 bar of boost reliably. Pair with a custom Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (hybrid core, 76mm compressor wheel) and a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate for precise boost control.

Fuel System: Upgrade to a dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump setup with an Aeromotive A1000 fuel pressure regulator, feeding 1,000cc ID1000 injectors. Integrate a Motec M150 ECU with a custom flex-fuel ethanol sensor for E85 compatibility, paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel intercooler piping system and a PWR 4.5-core front-mount intercooler.

Drivetrain: Install a Quaife ATB differential in the stock Getrag 280 6-speed transmission, reinforced with a PPG straight-cut gearset (2.95:1 1st gear) and a Sachs twin-disc clutch with a 240mm flywheel. Replace the stock driveshafts with custom CV-jointed units from GKN Driveline to handle 600+ lb-ft of torque.
estetica: Body: Fit a custom widebody kit from Kato Racing, extending the fenders by 3 inches per side with carbon fiber overfenders and a vented hood (also carbon fiber) to clear the GTX4202R turbo. Add a custom rear diffuser from APR Performance with integrated twin 3.5-inch exhaust outlets (stainless steel, quad-tip).

Suspension: Install a full Ohlins Road & Track coilover kit (DFV 2-way adjustable dampers) with custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) and spherical bearing top mounts from SuperPro. Pair with polyurethane bushings (full set from Whiteline) and a custom front strut tower brace from Cusco (2.5mm thick steel).

Wheels & Aero: Mount a set of BBS LM-R wheels (9x18 ET15 front, 11x18 ET25 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear). Add a custom front splitter from Seibon Carbon with integrated canards and a GT-style rear wing from Voltex (Type 3, 1,700mm width, 300mm chord) for downforce.
